faqs.question: What special packages does SpaceWing offer?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing offers several unique packages: Space Wedding Package ($750,000) includes ceremony in orbit and Earth as your witness; Honeymoon Among Stars ($1.2 million) for couples includes private cabin and romantic space dining; Astronaut For A Day ($175,000) combines suborbital flight with extended training; Corporate Mission allows team-building in space; and our exclusive First 100 Founders Program offers lifetime benefits.

faqs.question: What is the Space Wedding Package?
faqs.answer: Our Space Wedding Package is truly out of this world! For $750,000, you and your partner receive: private orbital ceremony with up to 4 guests, officiated by our trained crew, professional photography and videography, custom space-worthy wedding attire, romantic zero-G first dance, champagne toast (space-safe formula!), and a keepsake wedding album. It's the ultimate destination wedding.

faqs.question: Do you offer anniversary specials?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Anniversary Among the Stars package offers 15% off for couples celebrating milestones (10th, 25th, 50th anniversaries). Includes complimentary champagne, private dinner, and anniversary photo session with Earth as backdrop. Past customers have renewed vows, recreated honeymoon memories, and created unforgettable celebrations.

faqs.question: What is the Founders Program?
faqs.answer: Our First 100 Founders Program is an exclusive opportunity for the first 100 customers. Benefits include: permanent 10% discount on all future flights, exclusive Founders-only mission opportunities, input on future destination development, name inscribed on our Founders Monument at SpaceWing headquarters, and lifetime VIP concierge service. Only 17 spots remain!

faqs.question: Are there corporate or group packages?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing Corporate Missions offer unique team experiences: full spacecraft charter (up to 12 passengers), customized training and mission objectives, optional team-building exercises in zero-G, meeting facilities on our Orbital Station, and branded mission patches and materials. Prices start at $8 million for a 3-day orbital corporate retreat.

faqs.question: What is the SpaceCation bundle?
faqs.answer: SpaceCation combines your space flight with a luxury Earth vacation. Packages include: 3 days at our partner resort near the spaceport, spa treatments and relaxation before flight, your space mission, and a week-long post-flight celebration vacation. Popular destinations include Florida beaches, California wine country, or Caribbean resorts. Bundles save 10-15% versus booking separately.

faqs.question: Do you have referral rewards?
faqs.answer: Our StarReferral program rewards you for introducing others to space travel: Refer one person who completes a booking and receive $25,000 credit toward future flights. Refer three or more and receive $100,000 credit plus complimentary cabin upgrade. Top referrers each year receive a free suborbital flight!

faqs.question: Are there seasonal promotions?
faqs.answer: SpaceWing offers several seasonal promotions throughout the year: New Year's Stargazer Sale (January, up to 15% off), Summer Solstice Special (June, bonus nights at Orbital Station), Black Friday/Cyber Monday deals, and our Anniversary Week promotions in December. Newsletter subscribers receive early access to all promotions.

faqs.question: What is the Academic Explorer Program?
faqs.answer: Our Academic Explorer Program offers discounted rates for educational institutions and researchers: 25% discount for accredited educational institutions, student group rates for supervised missions, research payload opportunities, and partnership programs for space science curricula. Contact our Academic Partnerships team for details.

faqs.question: Can I create a custom package?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our VIP Services team specializes in creating bespoke space experiences. Past custom packages have included: milestone birthday celebrations, proposal packages (success rate: 100%), memorial services (scattering ashes in orbit), artistic residencies, and documentary film projects. If you can dream it, we'll explore how to make it happen.
